Package de.uka.ilkd.key.rule.match.vm.instructions

Interface MatchInstruction

All Known Subinterfaces:
MatchOperatorInstruction
All Known Implementing Classes:
BindVariablesInstruction, Instruction, MatchElementaryUpdateInstruction, MatchFormulaSVInstruction, MatchModalOperatorSVInstruction, MatchOpIdentityInstruction, MatchProgramInstruction, MatchProgramSVInstruction, MatchSchemaVariableInstruction, MatchSortDependingFunctionInstruction, MatchTermLabelInstruction, MatchTermSVInstruction, MatchUpdateSVInstruction, MatchVariableSVInstruction, UnbindVariablesInstruction
public interface MatchInstruction
Interface that has to be implemented by instructions for the matching virtual machine
